accurate.why: All claims match the bill text and the CRA reference is accurate real-world context.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; the Congressional Review Act reference is correct context for chapter 8 of title 5.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the resolution disapproves the DOE rule under the CRA.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Explains the rule is invalidated and has no force or effect under the CRA mechanism.

exceptions_conditions.why: The bill contains no material exceptions or conditions to note.

effective_dates.why: Correctly notes the resolution was approved May 9, 2025.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the resolution's sole operative effect of nullifying the rule.

objective_tone.why: The summary is neutral and descriptive with no editorializing.

concise.why: Concise with no padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names the Office of Energy Efficiency and Renewable Energy, DOE, and the CRA.

correct_figures.why: Federal Register citation, date, and approval date all match the bill text.
